name: Primordial Evil
bio: Little is known about the Primordial Evil. It is just said that he was the first man to fall to the temptation of dark and it twisted the very fabric of his soul.
He lays dormant at the base of a forest just south of the vale. Most people do not even know of his legend and those who do have no interest in waking that level of evil.
He is a skeletal figure immense in size with all sorts of overgrowth all around his body.
One of Valkorath's ancient Titans, named alongside Corthos, Zornath, The Unknown, and The Death Dealer -- beings whose true origins are 'shrouded in myth.'
